---
title: "Canon in D"
date: "2024-09-16T15:01:23"
date-modified: "2024-09-18T16:01:23"
format: 
  html: default
image: "../img/tele.jpg"
categories:
  - 2024
  - Telecaster
  - Fingerstyle
  - Song
  - Study
---

Tuning: Dropped D (Low E-string to D)

Tempo: 45 bpm

## Video

{{< video https://youtu.be/R_5a-qAqoKU >}}

Tempo: Free bpm

## Video

{{< video https://youtu.be/jpdqtxF39Gw >}}

## Fender Telecaster

Pickup Position: 5\
Master Volume: 9\
Master Tone: 6

## Joyo Tremolo

Intensity: 50%\
Rate: 50%

## Fender Blues Jr. III

Volume: 8.0\
Fat: OFF\
Treble: 6.5\
Bass: 6.0\
Middle: 6.0\
Master: 4.5\
Reverb: 5.0

## Blue Yeti

Gain: 9 o'clock\
Mode: Stereo, on desk near plant

{{< video https://youtu.be/M1tZ9mMHUas?si=heb33NktckgRdlKw >}}
